channel.title: hitvan — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by hitvan (hitvan).

item.title: CVE-2026-2253 · 7.7 HIGH — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics - Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics versions before 10.2.0.7 and 11.0.0.0, including 9.3.x and 8.3.x, does not prevent certain XML parsers from resolving external entities.

item.title: CVE-2026-2255 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics - Insufficiently Protected Credentials
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics versions before 10.2.0.6 and 11.0.0.0, including 9.3.x and 8.3.x, expose Hadoop cluster credentials in plain text through the Cluster Test API. Although the user should not see those explicitly, th…

item.title: CVE-2026-2254 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics - Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics versions before 10.2.0.6 and 11.0.0.0, including 9.3.x and 8.3.x, does not apply ACLs on certain API endpoints related to platform mail notfications.

item.title: CVE-2025-11159 · 9.1 CRITICAL — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics - Dependency on Vulnerable Third-Party Component
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics of all versions contain a JDBC driver for H2 databases which is vulnerable to external script execution when a new connection is created by a data source administrator.

item.title: CVE-2025-11158 · 9.1 CRITICAL — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics - Missing Authorization
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics versions before 10.2.0.6, including 9.3.x and 8.3.x, do not restrict Groovy scripts in new PRPT reports published by users, allowing insertion of arbitrary scripts and leading to a RCE.

item.title: CVE-2025-9121 · 8.8 HIGH — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Deserialization of Untrusted Data
item.description: Pentaho Data Integration and Analytics Community Dashboard Editor plugin versions before 10.2.0.4, including 9.3.0.x and 8.3.x, deserialize untrusted JSON data without constraining the parser to approved classes and methods.

item.title: CVE-2025-9122 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration and Analytics Community Dashboard Framework prior to versions 10.2.0.4, including 9.3.0.x and 8.3.x display the full server stack trace when encountering an error within the GetCdfResource servlet.

item.title: CVE-2025-24907 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics – Path Traversal
item.description: Overview The product uses external input to construct a pathname that should be within a restricted directory, but it does not properly neutralize '.../...//' (doubled triple dot slash) sequences that can resolve to a location that is outside of that…

item.title: CVE-2025-24911 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference
item.description: Overview XML documents optionally contain a Document Type Definition (DTD), which, among other features, enables the definition of XML entities. It is possible to define an entity by providing a substitution string in the form of a URI. Once the cont…

item.title: CVE-2025-24910 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference
item.description: Overview XML documents optionally contain a Document Type Definition (DTD), which, among other features, enables the definition of XML entities. It is possible to define an entity by providing a substitution string in the form of a URI. Once the cont…

item.title: CVE-2025-24909 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
item.description: Overview The software does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralize user-controllable input before it is placed in output that is used as a web page that is served to other users. (CWE-79) Description Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server…

item.title: CVE-2025-24908 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics – Path Traversal
item.description: Overview The product uses external input to construct a pathname that should be within a restricted directory, but it does not properly neutralize '.../...//' (doubled triple dot slash) sequences that can resolve to a location that is outside of that…

item.title: CVE-2025-0756 · 9.1 CRITICAL — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics - Improper Control of Resource Identifiers ('Resource Injection')
item.description: Overview The product receives input from an upstream component, but it does not restrict or incorrectly restricts the input before it is used as an identifier for a resource that may be outside the intended sphere of control. (CWE-99) Description Hit…

item.title: CVE-2025-0757 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
item.description: Overview The software does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralize user-controllable input before it is placed in output that is used as a web page that is served to other users. (CWE-79) Description Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server…

item.title: CVE-2025-0758 · 6.1 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource
item.description: Overview The product specifies permissions for a security-critical resource in a way that allows that resource to be read or modified by unintended actors. (CWE-732) Description Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server prior to versions 10.2…

item.title: CVE-2024-37363 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Incorrect Authorization
item.description: The product does not perform an authorization check when an actor attempts to access a resource or perform an action. (CWE-862) Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server versions before 10.2.0.0 and 9.3.0.8, including 8.3.x, do not correctly…

item.title: CVE-2024-37362 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics - Insufficiently Protected Credentials
item.description: The product transmits or stores authentication credentials, but it uses an insecure method that is susceptible to unauthorized interception and/or retrieval. (CWE-522) Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics versions before 10.2.0.0 and…

item.title: CVE-2024-6697 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Handling of Insufficient Permissions or Privileges
item.description: The product does not handle or incorrectly handles when it has insufficient privileges to access resources or functionality as specified by their permissions. This may cause it to follow unexpected code paths that may leave the product in an invalid…

item.title: CVE-2024-6696 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Insufficient Granularity of Access Control
item.description: The product implements access controls via a policy or other feature with the intention to disable or restrict accesses (reads and/or writes) to assets in a system from untrusted agents. However, implemented access controls lack required granularity,…

item.title: CVE-2024-37361 · 9.9 CRITICAL — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Deserialization of Untrusted Data
item.description: The application deserializes untrusted data without sufficiently verifying that the resulting data will be valid. (CWE-502) Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server versions before 10.2.0.0 and 9.3.0.9, including 8.3.x, deserialize untrusted…

item.title: CVE-2024-37360 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') The software does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralize user-controllable input before it is placed in output…

item.title: CVE-2024-37359 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server – Server Side Request Forgery
item.description: The web server receives a URL or similar request from an upstream component and retrieves the contents of this URL, but it does not sufficiently ensure that the request is being sent to the expected destination. (CWE-918) Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Busi…

item.title: CVE-2024-5705 · 8.8 HIGH — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Incorrect Authorization
item.description: The product performs an authorization check when an actor attempts to access a resource or perform an action, but it does not correctly perform the check. This allows attackers to bypass intended access restrictions. (CWE-863) Hitachi Vantara Pentaho…

item.title: CVE-2024-5706 · 8.8 HIGH — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics - Improper Control of Resource Identifiers ('Resource Injection')
item.description: The product receives input from an upstream component, but it does not restrict or incorrectly restricts the input before it is used as an identifier for a resource that may be outside the intended sphere of control. (CWE-99) Hitachi Vantara Pentaho…

item.title: CVE-2024-28981 · 8.5 HIGH — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics - Insufficiently Protected Credentials
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics versions before 10.1.0.0 and 9.3.0.8, including 8.3.x, discloses database passwords when searching metadata injectable fields.

item.title: CVE-2024-28984 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server prior to versions 10.1.0.0 and 9.3.0.7, including 8.3.x allow a malicious URL to inject content into the Analyzer plugin interface.

item.title: CVE-2024-28983 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server prior to versions 10.1.0.0 and 9.3.0.7, including 8.3.x allow a malicious URL to inject content into the Analyzer plugin interface.

item.title: CVE-2024-28982 · 7.1 HIGH — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server versions before 10.1.0.0 and 9.3.0.7, including 8.3.x do not correctly protect the ACL service endpoint of the Pentaho User Console against XML External Entity Reference.

item.title: CVE-2023-5617 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics - Server-generated Error Message Containing Sensitive Information
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics versions before 10.1.0.0 and 9.3.0.6, including 9.5.x and 8.3.x, display the version of Tomcat when a server error is encountered.

item.title: CVE-2023-3517 · 8.5 HIGH — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics - Improper Control of Resource Identifiers ('Resource Injection')
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Data Integration & Analytics versions before 9.5.0.1 and 9.3.0.5, including 8.3.x does not restrict JNDI identifiers during the creation of XActions, allowing control of system level data sources.

item.title: CVE-2023-6538 · 7.6 HIGH — System Management Unit (SMU) versions prior to 14.8.7825.01, used to manage Hitachi Vantara NAS products is susceptible to unintended information disclosure via unprivileged access to SMU configuration backup data.
item.description: SMU versions prior to 14.8.7825.01 are susceptible to unintended information disclosure, through URL manipulation. Authenticated users in Storage, Server or combined Server+Storage administrative roles are able to access SMU configuration backup, tha…

item.title: CVE-2023-5808 · 7.6 HIGH — System Management Unit (SMU) versions prior to 14.8.7825.01, used to manage Hitachi Vantara NAS products are susceptible to unintended information disclosure via unprivileged access to HNAS configuration backup and diagnostic data.
item.description: SMU versions prior to 14.8.7825.01 are susceptible to unintended information disclosure, through URL manipulation. Authenticated users in a Storage administrative role are able to access HNAS configuration backup and diagnostic data, that would norma…

item.title: CVE-2023-2358 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server – Password Stored in a Recoverable Format
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server prior to versions 9.5.0.0 and 9.3.0.4, including 8.3.x.x, saves passwords of the Hadoop Copy Files step in plaintext.

item.title: CVE-2022-4815 · 8 HIGH — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Deserialization of Untrusted Data
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server versions before 9.4.0.1 and 9.3.0.3, including 8.3.x deserialize untrusted JSON data without constraining the parser to approved classes and methods.

item.title: CVE-2023-1158 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Incorrect Authorization
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server versions before 9.4.0.1 and 9.3.0.3, including 8.3.x expose dashboard prompts to users who are not part of the authorization list.

item.title: CVE-2022-43770 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Incorrect Authorization
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server versions before 9.3.0.0, 9.2.0.4 and 8.3.0.27 does not correctly perform an authorization check in the dashboard editor plugin API.

item.title: CVE-2022-3695 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server prior to versions 9.3.0.0, 9.2.0.4 and 8.3.0.27 allow a malicious URL to inject content into a dashboard when the CDE plugin is present.

item.title: CVE-2022-4771 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server prior to versions 9.4.0.1 and 9.3.0.2, including 8.3.x allow a malicious URL to inject content into the Pentaho User Console through session variables.

item.title: CVE-2022-4770 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server prior to versions 9.4.0.0 and 9.3.0.2, including 8.3.x display the full parametrized SQL query in an error message when an invalid character is used within a Pentaho Report (*.prpt).

item.title: CVE-2022-4769 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server prior to versions 9.4.0.0 and 9.3.0.2, including 8.3.x display the target path on host when a file is uploaded with an invalid character in its name.

item.title: CVE-2022-43772 · 3.8 LOW — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server versions before 9.4.0.0 and 9.3.0.1, including 8.3.x with the Big Data Plugin expose the username and password of clusters in clear text into system logs.

item.title: CVE-2022-3960 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Neutralization of Directives in Statically Saved Code ('Static Code Injection')
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server prior to versions 9.4.0.1 and 9.3.0.2, including 8.3.x cannot allow a system administrator to disable scripting capabilities of the Community Dashboard Editor (CDE) plugin.

item.title: CVE-2022-43941 · 7.1 HIGH — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server versions before 9.4.0.1 and 9.3.0.2, including 8.3.x do not correctly protect the Post Analysis service endpoint of the data access plugin against out-of-band XML External Entity Reference.

item.title: CVE-2022-43771 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server versions before 9.4.0.0 and 9.3.0.1, including 8.3.x, using the Pentaho Data Access plugin exposes a service endpoint for CSV import which allows a user supplied path to access resources that are out…

item.title: CVE-2022-43940 · 8.8 HIGH — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Incorrect Authorization
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server versions before 9.4.0.1 and 9.3.0.2, including 8.3.x do not correctly perform an authorization check in the data source management service.

item.title: CVE-2022-43939 · 8.6 HIGH 💥 🌩️ — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Use of Non-Canonical URL Paths for Authorization Decisions
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server versions before 9.4.0.1 and 9.3.0.2, including 8.3.x contain security restrictions using non-canonical URLs which can be circumvented.

item.title: CVE-2022-43938 · 8.8 HIGH — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Improper Neutralization of Directives in Statically Saved Code ('Static Code Injection')
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server prior to versions 9.4.0.1 and 9.3.0.2, including 8.3.x cannot allow a system administrator to disable scripting capabilities of Pentaho Reports (*.prpt) through the JVM script manager.

item.title: CVE-2022-43773 · 8.8 HIGH — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server prior to versions 9.4.0.1 and 9.3.0.2, including 8.3.x is installed with a sample HSQLDB data source configured with stored procedures enabled.

item.title: CVE-2022-43769 · 8.8 HIGH 💥 — Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Failure to Sanitize Special Elements into a Different Plane (Special Element Injection)
item.description: Hitachi Vantara Pentaho Business Analytics Server prior to versions 9.4.0.1 and 9.3.0.2, including 8.3.x allow certain web services to set property values which contain Spring templates that are interpreted downstream.

item.title: CVE-2021-45448 · 7.1 HIGH — Pentaho Business Analytics Server - Pentaho Analyzer plugin exposes a service endpoint for templates which allows a user supplied path to access resources that are out of bounds.
item.description: Pentaho Business Analytics Server versions before 9.2.0.2 and 8.3.0.25 using the Pentaho Analyzer plugin exposes a service endpoint for templates which allows a user-supplied path to access resources that are out of bounds. The software uses external…
